productDisplayName: Palm Tree Girl's Belen Pedal Pusher Kidswear
description: CompositionDark blue denim pedal pushers made of 100% cotton that is mildly stretchable, with two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back, light brown thread detailing over the back pockets, branded button, studs and palm tree embroidery on the left side near pocketFittingRegular 55 cm  Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detatchable accessories Indulge the sporty side of your little girl in these comfy pedal pushers from gini and jony that plays as hard as she does. The soft fabric keeps your little girl comfortable all day. Team this with white or pink tees and crocs footwear for a great time out with friends.
